info.description:
Fastpayhotels Booking API is a specification designed for API integration customers in order to connect to Fastpayhotels Booking Engine System. 


Featuring multiple breaking changes into Booking API, v2 will reside in its own service URL, so customer can switch from v1 at their own rate

As a rule, all URL for BookingAPI v2 are the same as legacy V1, just by adding v2 to URL address.
Some API methods are totally interchangeable, like Catalogue and Booking folders, and will work seamlessly even if customer make cross calls from v2 to v1, but we do not ensure that this will be the same in the future, so a recommendation for full  migration to v2 is indeed the best road of action

Thus the API method url would be:

https://[ENVIRONMENT_URL]/api/v2/[controller][method]

For example for Search method in production environment, no custom customer URL:

    ** https://avail.fastpayhotels.net/api/v2/booking/search **

Dev environment would follow the same URL scheme


# **What's new in 2.1.3 version?**
- **Availability in local currency**
  - Customers can now see hotel availability and book in the local currency of the hotel. (Previous authorisation is required)
  - See #/definitions/options
  
- **Payment details**
  - Customer capability to send VCC payment details in booking request. (Previous authorisation is required)     
  - See #/definitions/payment
  

# **What's new in 2.1.2 version?**

- **RatePlan details**
  - New property ratePlanDetails: Contains detailed descriptive info for ratePlan selected
  - See #availRoomRate/ratePlanDetails

# **What's new in 2.1.1 version?**

- **Nearby Airport IATA Code added to hotelDetails API request**
  - See #hotelInfo/location node to find new IATA info for hotel nearby airport.


# **What's new in 2.1.0 version?**

- Destination and supplier Taxes:
  
  - Now all rates will include hotel taxes information with total transparency
  - Public price will be updated with taxes not already included in base price
  
  
- Special Requests:

  - Customers now have the capability to include special requests for their guests during Reservation step.


# **What's new in 2.0.0 version?**

FPH BookingAPI v2 is a new evolution from legacy 1.x API, introducing a brand new workflow for search and book.
Based on previous improvements, v2 increases speed and reliability further, and improves result quality

Main new features are:

- **Fast Search feature.**
  - New method for fast searching multiple hotels.
  - Accepting multiple hotel codes or area, return per-room/per-mealplan cheaper results per single hotel.
  - Ideal for first high-speed low-detail preview in customer search
  - Proceed to classic Avail Request after customer select suitable hotels
  
- **Reduced Product Token**
  - To replace old too heavy Reservation Token in Availability Request, BookingAPIv2 will return a lighter token called "Product Code". This will improve speed and traffic size
  
- **New LiveCheck Method** 
  - To replace legacy Prebook method, a new Live Check method allowing Product Code is introduced.
  - This new method will allow for much more detailed response than previous Prebook method, including booking rules and other product detailed info
  - The result is guaranteed to be checked against supplier system (for selected chains) and ready to proceed to Book phase
  

 # **Workflows**

Fastpayhotels Booking API has three main workflows, hotel portfolio and catalogue, availability queries, and real time booking methods.

These three workflows are hosted in different URL endpoints so implementors should take into account that different security token retrieval must be performed for each workflow


As per development integration phase, URL endpoints would be:

- Portfolio and catalogue endpoint: *https://catalogue.fastpayhotels.net/api/v2*
- Availability requests endpoint: *https://avail.fastpayhotels.net/api/v2*
- Booking engine access endpoint: *https://booking.fastpayhotels.net/api/v2*


**Mandatory HTTPS protocol**
All request to API must be performed through https:// protocol



**Security based on OAuth 2.0 technology**.
The API has two main roles **Customer API** and **Agency** and the authentication protocol is token-based.
Once you get a valid token, you retain access as long as the token remains valid. 
The token is invalidated if the access credentials change or the token expires.

**Authentication URL:** .../security/token

For hotel portfolio and catalogue workflow you can get a **Customer API** role access token by using client credential **client Id** and **client secret**.
- Method: POST
- Endpoint: https://catalogue.fastpayhotels.net/security/token
- Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded
- grant_type: client_credentials
- client_id: client_id (provided by Fastpayhotels)
- client_secret: client_secret (provided by Fastpayhotels)
- version: 1

**Example:**
  POST //security/token HTTP/1.1
  Host: catalogue.fastpayhotels.net
  Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded
  grant_type=client_credentials&client_id=example.fph.com&client_secret=wPEfpVQQDkRD3nbaktoR0g5a%2BXMfwBZvWv7wjGeKwVc%3D&version=1 


For avail and real-time booking workflow you can get an **Agency** role access token using user credentials  **username** and **password** and client credential **client Id** and **client secret**.
- Method: POST
- Endpoint: https://avail.fastpayhotels.net/security/token 
**Note: The availability endpoint can be customized per customer.**
- Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded
- grant_type: password
- username: username (provided by Fastpayhotels)
- password: password (provided by Fastpayhotels)
- client_id: client_id (provided by Fastpayhotels)
- client_secret: client_secret p(provided by Fastpayhotels)
- version: 1

**Example:**
    POST //security/token HTTP/1.1
    Host: avail.fastpayhotels.net
    Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded
    grant_type=password&username=username&password=password&client_id=example.fph.com&client_secret=wPEfpVQQDkRD3nbaktoR0g5a%2BXMfwBZvWv7wjGeKwVc%3D&version=1


**To ensure max compatibility, make sure to use x-www-form-urlencoded post**

**The access token is valid for one year.**


The Agency role token can also access the hotel portfolio workflow.

Credentials and environment URLs will be provided by Fastpayhotels during development.



 **Cancellation Policies**
 
 Cancellation policy defines that penalty will be charged when a guest cancels the booking at certain advance time range. The penalty is related to No-show or a time range before check-in.
 
 Descriptive Penalty Type: when received as descriptive it means that we are working on codifying the penalty rules.
 
 **Time Range**
 
 No Show: The customer doesn’t cancel the booking or cancel it after arrival day. The first penalty without advance day is the penalty of no show.
Deadline on arrival day or No-show: Many hotels have a deadline on arrival day and will apply different penalty when the customer cancels the booking after the deadline. The format of deadline is 4 AM/PM. Deadline always will appear after **#** Example: 100P_7D15P#3PM. If deadline does not appear, the default deadline time will be 12AM accommodation local time.
Advance day: The format is 1D, 2D, 7D or AD. 1D means 24 hours before ‘Deadline’. AD means unlimited advance day. 
Advance hour: The time format is 1H,75H or 150H. Means X hours before ‘Deadline’.
Advance day and hour can be a time range: In this case is separate by a T. Example: 2DT1D10P.
Timezone: The timezone of the deadline or advance day is accommodation local timezone.

**Penalty Type**

Percentage: will charge the percentage of: Booking Value 80P, Most expensive night MEN100P or Nights’ average AVG50P.
Amount: will charge fix amount. The currency of this amount will be the same as booking rate. For example, 120, 245.75.
Nights: night fee to be charged. For example, 1N, 2N.

**Examples**
1. 100P_AD100P => Non Refundable.
2. 0 or 0P or AD0_0 or AD0P_0P => Free cancellation.
3. 100P_0D80P_1D70P_5D2N_AD0#9PM (Booking Date on 2021-03-01, check-in on 2021-08-10)
  All advance day/hour penalty will apply after 9PM in accommodation Time Zone.
  100P => is the penalty of no show. It means 100 percent of the whole stay will be charged if customer doesn't cancel the booking or doesn't arrive at hotel.
  0D80P => defines the penalty between 9PM on arrival day (0D) and no show. It means 80 percent of whole stay will be charge if booking is cancelled after 9PM, 2021-08-10.
  1D70P => define the penalty between 9PM, 2021-08-09 and 9PM, 2021-08-10. It means 70 percent of whole stay will be charged.
  5D2N => defines the penalty between 9PM, 2021-08-05 and 9PM, 2021-08-09. It means 2 nights will be charged.
  AD0 => defines the penalty between booking date and 9PM, 2021-08-05. Free cancellation.
info.title: Fastpayhotels Booking API v2

tags.name: Catalogue
tags.description: Everything about Hotel=> Hotel List, Catalogue Data, Hotel Detail Info

post.summary: Retrieve the list of hotels filtered by dates.
post.description: This method is used by client to get the list of hotels which content has been updated from a date.

requestBody.description:
Hotel list request message. Filters are optional.
Can send filters as null but if filters are used **toLastUpdateDate** must be greater than **fromLastUpdateDate**. 
Also can send **fromLastUpdate** with a correct value and not send **toLastUpdateDate** or send null.
System will respond with the list of hotels which content has been updated between filtered dates.
**Date filters** use Format ISO 8601.

200.description:
Successful operation.
If there is no data to display, response message will have hotelSummary array empty.

400.description:
Bad request, examples:
 - **Invalid request structure.**
 - **Request message empty.** 
 - **Datetime fields wrong format.**

post.summary: Retrieve content information about a single hotel.
post.description: This method is used by agency to get content information available about a single hotel. Main info, services, rooms, images, etc.

requestBody.description:
Hotel detail request message. 
Field **code**  is required, **languages** array is optional. 
Some information have multilanguage captions => rooms, hotel category, hotel type, meal plans, etc. 
Can choose diferent languages within the **languages** array based on **ISO 639-1**. If languages array is empty by default system always return.
multilanguage captions in English.
If different languages are selected and system doesn't have translations, captions array will be empty.

200.description:
Successful operation.
Returns hotel details content data.

400.description:
Bad request, examples:
 - **Invalid request structure.**
 - **Request message empty.** 
 - **code field is null or empty.**

post.description: This method returns available hotel mapping information (room types, services, host segments, hotel categories, hotel type, etc.) based on last update date.

requestBody.description:
Catalogued data request. 
Fields **lastUpdateDate** and **languages** array are optional.
**Date filter** use Format ISO 8601.
All data have multilanguage captions. 
Can choose different languages within the languages array based on ISO 639-1. If languages array is empty by default system always return
multilanguage captions in English.
If different languages are selected and system doesn't have translations, captions array will be empty.

200.description:
Successful operation.
If there is no data to display the arrays will return empty.

400.description:
Bad request, examples:
 - **Invalid request structure.**
 - **Request message empty.**
 - **Datetime fields wrong format.**

post.summary: Retrieve the list of hotels filtered by dates.
post.description: This method is used by client to get the list of available hotels for a agency.

requestBody.description:
Security token used must be **agency token**.
Filters are optional.
Can send filters as null but if filters are used **toLastUpdateDate** must be greater than **fromLastUpdateDate**. 
Also can send **fromLastUpdate** with a correct value and not send **toLastUpdateDate** or send null.
System will respond with the list of available hotels.
**Date filters** use Format ISO 8601.

200.description:
Successful operation.
If there is no data to display, response message will have hotelSummary array empty.

400.description:
Bad request, examples:
 - **Invalid request structure.**
 - **Request message empty.** 
 - **Datetime fields wrong format.**

post.summary: Return a list of cheaper prices for selected hotels.
post.description:
This api method is used to query a list of availability rates for broad search request. FPH will return best rates only per hotel requested. 
Best rates include one single rate per room, board, and flexibility (NRF and Flexible ie)

parameters:
  - List of hotel codes
  - Location.
  - Areas.
  - Zones.
  - Occupancy
For the sake of backward compatibility, Search method will use the same request/response json structure of Availability v1, allowing customer to implement it with minimum effort.
Search method will return a stripped down version of same availRoomRate list, focussing in just speed and max number of results

requestBody.description:
Search Request:
  - Fields **checkIn** and **checkOut** are required. Also, **checkOut** must be greater than **checkIn**.
  - Field **occupancies** is required.
  - Field **occupancy** has been deprecated.
  - Field **adults** can't be null or less than zero.
  - Field **children** can be null, minimum value zero.
  - If **children** field is zero **childrendAges** array can be null.
  - If **children** field is greater than zero **childrendAges** array. can't be null and must be the same number of items that **children**.
  - Field **currency** is required, system validate if it is an available currency for the client.
  
**Is recommended dividing request per touristic area (areas created with the appropriate amount of properties) or use the touristic area reference to divide properties in each search.**

200.description:
Successful operation.
If there is no availability to display **hotelAvails** array will be empty.

400.description:
Bad request, example:
 - **Invalid request structure.**
 - **Request message empty.** 
 - **Datetime fields wrong format.**
 - **Required fields null or empty.**
 - **Currency not available to request.**

post.summary: Perform a fast live check both on-site and on-line against supplier system (for selected chains).
post.description: This method is used to live check availability based on a Product Code returned by previous Search response.

requestBody.description:
LiveCheck Request:
  - All fields are mandatory

200.description:
Successful operation. 
If any avail token doesn't have availability **success* is false and **reservationTokens** return null.

400.description:
Bad request, examples:
 - **Invalid request structure.**
 - **Request message empty.**
 - **Datetime fields wrong format.**
 - **Required fields null or empty.**
 - **Currency not available to request.**
 - **Availtoken expired.**

post.description: This method is used by client to confirm a booking and get a realtime confirmation.

requestBody.description:
Book Request:
  - Field **messageID** is required.
  - Field **customer** is required.
  - Field **currency** is required, system validate if it is an available currency for the client.
  - Field **agencyCode** is required.
  - Field **requests** is not required.
  - Field **rooms** array can't be null and one room is required at least.
  - Field **prebookedToken** is required in all rooms.

200.description:
Successful operation. 
If there is no confirm to display **success** is false and **bookingInfo** return null.

400.description:
Bad request, examples:
 - **Invalid request structure.**
 - **Request message empty.**
 - **Required fields null or empty.**
 - **Currency not available to request.**

post.description: This method is used by client to cancel reservations.

200.description:
Successful operation. 
If cancellation is not possible **success** is false.

400.description:
Bad request, examples:
 - **Invalid request structure.**
 - **Request message empty.**
 - **Fields required not found.**

post.summary: This method is used to get the list of booking within a specified timeframe.
post.description: This method is used by client to retrieve the list of bookings within a specified timeframe.

requestBody.description:
Client can filter by creation date, checkIn date or last update date. **At least a date filter is required**.
**Date filters** use Format ISO 8601.

200.description:
Successful operation. 
If there is no data to display bookings array is null.

400.description:
Bad request, examples:
 - **Invalid request structure.**
 - **Request message empty.**
 - **Datetime fields wrong format.**

post.summary: Retrieve unique booking based on booking codes.
post.description: This method is used by client to retrieve a unique booking based on Fastpayhotels booking code or agency booking code.

requestBody.description: Booking detail request. Client can filter by **bookingCode** or **customerCode**, at least one is required.

200.description:
Successful operation. 
If there is no data to display booking is null.

400.description:
Bad request, examples:
 - **Invalid request structure.**
 - **Request message empty.**
 - **Filters required not found.**

messageID.description: A unique id to identify request and response.

items.description: Hotel codes to search availability. Client can get all hotel codes in hotel list message
List of Open Location Codes (OLC Codes) https://maps.google.com/pluscodes/ Minimum 4 characters
List of touristic Areas (field **Code**). Client can get all available touristic areas in catalogued data message
tags to search availability. Client can get all available tags in catalogued data message and tag available for each hotel in hotel detail message.

messageID.description: A unique id to identify request and response.
A unique id to identify request and response.

country.description: Country code. Client can get all available countries in catalogued data message.

availRoomRate.description: Available product. Properties marked as [S] will be returned in search request.

reservationToken.description: Token to identify available product. Only returned for LiveCheck method

productCode.description: Code to identify product rate. Only returned for Search method

roomCode.description: Room code in Fastpayhotels' system. Client can get room data in catalogued message.

roomName.description: Room name in Fastpayhotels' system. Client can get room data in catalogued message.

ratePlanDetails.example: Dynamic Prepay and Save - Room Only

mealPlanCode.description: Meal plan code in Fastpayhotels' system. Client can get meal plans data in catalogued message.

mealPlanName.description: Meal plan code in Fastpayhotels' system. Client can get meal plans data in catalogued message.

priceBinding.description: If is true, PublicPrice is made mandatory. (Public Price must be applied for final customer price).

commission.description: Client commission amount. Will be sent only if client has been configured to receive commissionable prices.

currency.description: Currency based on availability request or default agency currency.

promo.description: Define if this availability product is a offer.

description.example: General tax applied to all the guests.

amount.description: The amount that the tax costs.

calculationType.description: How the tax it's calculated, can be FIXED or PERCENT.

currency.description: ISO currency code. Not needed if the tax calculation type it's PERCENT

rule.description: Wich rule must be applied with that tax. The values can be PERROOMPERSTAY, PERROOMPERNIGHT, PERPERSONPERSTAY, PERPERSONPERNIGHT, PERPERSONPERWEEK, PERROOMPERWEEK

type.description: Identifies how the tax applies on the cost. The values can ve INCLUSIVE,EXCLUSIVE, OTHER

todate.description: Date to tax applies. Can be null.

countryOfResidence.description: Country code of main guest residence's country. Format ISO 3166-1 alpha-2.

nationality.description: Country code of main guest nationality. Format ISO 3166-1 alpha-2.

hotelCode.description: Hotel unique code in Fastpayhotels' system.

bookingCode.description: Code of booking in Fastpayhotels' system.

specialNotes.example: Swimming pool closed for a month

messageID.description: A unique id to identify request and response.
A unique id to identify request and response.

commission.description: Client commission amount. Will be sent only if client has been configured to receive commissionable prices.

comments.description: Agency comments sent in book request.

specialNotes.example: Swimming pool closed for a month

messageID.description: A unique id to identify request and response.

hotelCode.description: Unique hotel code in Fastpayhotels' system. Client can get all hotel codes in hotel list message.

from.description: Filter by creation date (from). Format ISO 8601.

to.description: Filter by creation date (from). Format ISO 8601.

from.description: Filter by checkin date (from). Format ISO 8601.

to.description: Filter by checkin date (from). Format ISO 8601.

from.description: Filter by modification date (from). Format ISO 8601.

to.description: Filter by modification date (from). Format ISO 8601.

messageID.description: A unique id to identify request and response.
A unique id to identify request and response.

comments.example: Please client need a non-smoking room.

requests.description: List of special requests from the guest/s.

comments.description: List of client comments to the room.

items.example: The client prefers a room with sea views.

reservationToken.description: Token to identify available product. It is required to get this token through booking/prebook method.

messageID.description: A unique id to identify request and response.

code.description: Room code in Fastpayhotels' system. Client can get room data in catalogued message.

ratePlanDetails.example: Dynamic Prepay and Save - Room Only

commission.description: Client commission amount per room. Will be sent only if client has been configured to receive commissionable prices.

cancellationPolicy.description: Cancellation policy defines what penalty will be charge when a guest cancels the booking at certain advance time range. The penalty is related to no show or a time range before no show.

description.description: Cancellation policy description. This property is not returned for v2 Search method

cancellable.description: It indicates if supplier allows cancellation or not. Some suppliers will not allow to cancel booking if the booking is a non-refundable booking as 100% charge will apply. Some suppliers will allow to cancel booking even if it is a non-refundable rate. This node indicates only if the supplier allows cancellation of the booking but cannot be used as a reference of a non-refundable rate.

messageID.description: A unique id to identify request and response.
A unique id to identify request and response.

cancellationPenalty.description: Cancellation cost applied when cancelling a booking.

messageID.description: A unique id to identify request and response.

lastUpdateDate.description: Filter data by modification date, this filter is optional. Format ISO 8601

languages.description: List of languages in which the information is requested, use culture ids based on **ISO 639-1**, this filter is optional. If **languages** is null or empty by default system return "English".

description.description: Description of hotel. Language based on request. By default return English.

type.description: Define type of description, long or short.

content.example: Located right on Montaza Beach, this 5 star resort combines an impressive range of features and facilities. It features a private beach, 2 pools, a kids' pool and club. Jaz Belvedere is 6 KM away from SOHO Square and 13 KM away from the International Congress Center.Styled with touches of traditional Arabian-Moroccan design, the hotel is one of the finest in Sharm El Sheikh. At Belvedere, you can enjoy something very special; warm, individual service, entertainment programs, and diving.Activities can be enjoyed at the resort that includes beach tennis,volleyball court and a multi-purpose court. Guests can enjoy water sport facilities, windsurfing, diving, snorkeling, and canoeing with an added charge. The spa includes reviving treatments, foot-bath, massages, relaxation programs, and beauty services with an added charge. Jaz Belvedere Resort is just 10 km from Sharm El Sheikh International Airport and 20 km from Sharm El Sheikh town centre.

guestScope.description: Define if the tax scope is applicable **per person** or **per room**.

destinationScope.description: Define if the tax is applicable **per night**, **per week** or **per stay**

onlyForAdults.description: Define if the tax is applicable only for adults or to children too.

ageOver.description: Define from what age the tax is applicable. Only needed if **onlyForAdults** is false.

message.description:
Error message generated by Fastpayhotels' system.
Can be error by Bad Request (400), Unauthorized token (401) or Server Error (501)

name.description: Name of hotel in Fastpayhotels' system.

code.description: Hotel unique code in Fastpayhotels' system.

messageID.description: A unique id to identify request and response.

name.description: Name of hotel in Fastpayhotels´ system.

code.description: Hotel unique code in Fastpayhotels' system.

specialNotes.example: Swimming pool closed for a month

messageID.description: A unique id to identify request and response.

code.description: Unique hotel code in Fastpayhotels' system.

languages.description: List of languages in which the information is requested, use culture ids based on **ISO 639-1**, this filter is optional. If **languages** is null or empty by default system return "English".

messageID.description: A unique id to identify request and response.

fromLastUpdateDate.description: Filter by modification date (from), this filter is optional. Format ISO 8601.

toLastUpdateDate.description: Filter by modification date (to), this filter is optional. Format ISO 8601.

messageID.description: A unique id to identify request and response.

hotelProduct.description: Filter avail based on hotel product, room, rate or meal plan.

roomTypeCode.description: Room code in Fastpayhotels system. Client can get the room list in Catalogued data message.

mealPlanCode.description: Meal plan code in Fastpayhotels system. Client can get the mealPlanCode list in Catalogued data message.

name.description: Name of hotel in Fastpayhotels' system.

code.description: Unique hotel code in Fastpayhotels' system.

name.description: Default image name in Fastpayhotels' system.

featured.description: Define if the pic is the main one.

captions.description: Multicultural list of captions based on request. If Fastpayhotels doesn't have any translation caption return empty.

items.description: Ages of children, if childCount is greater than 0 this field is required.

messageID.description: A unique id to identify request and response.

fromLastUpdateDate.description: Filter by modification date (from), this filter is optional. Format ISO 8601.

toLastUpdateDate.description: Filter by modification date (to), this filter is optional. Format ISO 8601.

messageID.description: A unique id to identify request and response.
A unique id to identify request and response.

productCode.description: Product code returned by Search method. Identifies a single rate allowed to be booked

quantity.description: Number of units to reserve. Default value is 1

parameters.description: A list of optional search modifiers

countryOfResidence.description: Country code of main guest residence's country. Format ISO 3166-1 alpha-2.

nationality.description: Country code of main guest nationality. Format ISO 3166-1 alpha-2.

occupancyDistribution.description: Room occupancy distributions allowed, the first number represent adults and the second number represent children.

OLCCodes.description: List of OLC Codes assigned to the touristic area

message.description: The requests done by the guest.

type.description: Request type in FastPayHotels system. Can be BEDTYPE, NONSMOKING, SPECIALVIEW, WITHOUTNOISE, OTHERS.Default value = OTHERS.

returnLocalCurrencyRates.description: if set to true hotel local currency is returned if requested un currency node.

cardCode.description: Type of card. MC, VI or AX.
